title: oncidium dactyliferum
intro: Oncidium dactyliferum, also known as the "finger orchid," is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Oncidiinae subtribe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Oncidium dactyliferum include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, due to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Oncidium dactyliferum are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by drying the plant material to make a powder for capsules or tinctures.
